approaches.title: Greedy cumulative fuel tracking
approaches.summary: Tracks the total net fuel to determine feasibility and resets the candidate start whenever the running tank becomes negative. Revision 1 uses an incorrect best-

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Incorrect attempt that computes edge differences and selects the station with the largest local excess as the start.
Replaces the incorrect selection with the standard O(n) greedy scan using total excess fuel and a resettable running-tンク
